layout_description:
Option: OPT-1-REVISED
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with full-width footer bar. The slide uses a side-by-side arrangement with two equal-width content columns occupying the upper portion of the slide body, followed by a full-width footer bar at the bottom. Each column is a self-contained vertical section with an icon badge, section header, subtitle, and bullet list. The layout follows a clean, structured grid with consistent alignment across both columns. All elements snap to a 2-column × 3-row grid (columns = 50% width each, rows = header zone + body zone + footer zone). Moderate padding surrounds all content. The design emphasizes visual hierarchy through colored header treatments and dashed separator lines between bullet items. This revision addresses the judge's feedback by increasing font sizes and vertical spacing within both columns to fill at least 65% of each container's inner height, eliminating the excessive whitespace below the bullet lists.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform): Left column occupying 50% of slide width, positioned from left edge to horizontal midpoint. Contains four vertically stacked elements: (1) Icon badge at top — small filled circle with brand primary color, white icon centered inside, positioned left-aligned with small top margin. Size proportional to body text height (small, not dominating). (2) Section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' — brand primary color, bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below icon with small vertical gap. Font size: heading font, medium-to-large range. (3) Subtitle 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' — body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below section header with minimal gap. Font size: body font, standard size. (4) Bullet list with 6 items — each bullet replaced with small brand primary color circle marker (proportional to text height, not oversized), body font, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset from circle markers. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT: Increase bullet text font size to the upper end of the medium-to-large range (approaching the 18pt ceiling for body text) to fill at least 65% of the container's inner height. Increase line-height proportionally (1.4–1.6 line spacing) to distribute content evenly across available vertical space. Bullet items distributed using flexGrow so they occupy the full remaining vertical space within the column. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last item), spanning from left edge of text to right edge of column. Separator lines positioned with increased vertical spacing to reflect the new font size and line-height. Column background: white or transparent. No border or container box around the column. Content-aware spacing: moderate padding between header elements, generous vertical distribution for bullet items to eliminate the excessive whitespace that was present in the previous attempt.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): Right column occupying 50% of slide width, positioned from horizontal midpoint to right edge. Identical structural treatment and font sizing to LEFT COLUMN to preserve within-slide uniformity (Rule C6). Contains: (1) Icon badge at top — small filled circle with brand accent color (or alternating brand color if design uses alternating pattern), white icon centered inside, positioned left-aligned with small top margin. Size identical to LEFT COLUMN icon badge. (2) Section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' — brand accent color (or same color as left column for consistency), bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below icon with small vertical gap. Font size: identical to LEFT COLUMN section header. (3) Subtitle 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' — body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below section header with minimal gap. Font size: identical to LEFT COLUMN subtitle. (4) Bullet list with 6 items — each bullet replaced with small brand accent color circle marker (matching header color, proportional to text height), body font, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset from circle markers. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT: Use the exact same increased font size as LEFT COLUMN bullet text (upper end of medium-to-large range, approaching 18pt ceiling) to maintain within-slide uniformity. Apply identical line-height (1.4–1.6 line spacing) to LEFT COLUMN. Bullet items distributed using flexGrow with identical flexGrow values to LEFT COLUMN so all row boundaries align horizontally across both columns. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last item), positioned at exactly the same vertical positions as the separators in LEFT COLUMN, spanning from left edge of text to right edge of column. Column background: white or transparent. No border or container box around the column. Top and bottom edges of this column must align exactly with LEFT COLUMN. Content fills at least 65% of container inner height, matching LEFT COLUMN density.
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Full-width footer bar spanning 100% of slide width, positioned at the bottom of the slide with a visible gap above the two columns. Height: compact — just enough to contain the text with small top and bottom padding (approximately 10–12% of slide height). Fill: brand accent color or brand primary color (choose the color that provides best contrast and visual balance with the column headers above). No border. Corners: slightly rounded (soft, not sharp). Text: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs' — white, body font, regular or semi-bold weight, horizontally centered, vertically centered within the bar. Font size: body font, standard size (same baseline as column subtitles). Text wraps to 2 lines if necessary to fit comfortably within the bar width with appropriate side padding. This footer serves as a visual anchor and summary statement for the entire slide. The footer bar provides visual closure and balances the slide composition.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): INACTIVE. The slide is well-filled by the two content columns and footer bar. With the increased font sizes and vertical spacing in C0 and C1, the content now occupies at least 65% of each container's inner height, eliminating the excessive whitespace issue. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The white slide background provides sufficient contrast and the content containers carry the visual weight.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): INACTIVE. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this layout. The two columns are visually independent and the footer is a separate full-width element. No arrows or connecting lines span between containers.
